positive: A minimalist, symmetrical celestial whale breaching through a cosmic nebula. The whale should have a deep, stylized silhouette, rendered in shades of midnight blue and indigo. It is surrounded by abstract, flowing bioluminescent particles, stylized stars, and geometric constellation patterns, using gradients of teal, electric purple, and gold accents. The overall composition must be perfectly centered, highly contrasted, and suitable for screen-printing on a solid fabric background. Art style should be highly detailed vector illustration meets ethereal etching, with sharp lines and clean edges, invoking a sense of wonder and tranquility. Studio lighting, centered composition, highly detailed, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, low resolution, cropped, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, gradient fade, out of focus, photorealistic, cartoon, ASCII
